title: sloanea rhodantha var. rhodantha
intro: Sloanea rhodantha var. rhodantha, also known as the "red flowered Sloanea", is a plant species in the family Erysaceae, characterized by its distinctive red flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where its leaves and roots are employed for their medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Sloanea rhodantha var. rhodantha are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often made into infusions or decoctions to be used as remedies for various ailments.
